title: Adopt a pet from SPCA
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route SPCA has many...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route SPCA has many adorable dogs, cats, puppies and kittens eagerly waiting for their forever homes.


> Come and meet these furry friends in Ossie Urban Road, Tamsui Industria, and find your perfect match.


For more information or to adopt, phone 044 878 1990.

Max is happiness in a body. He never stops smiling and wagging that tail. He is super lovable and playful, and great with other dogs. Would make a great family addition. He was surrendered and is around a year old.

August is Canis Africanus month. Kaptein shows all the traits of an intelligent, loyal, lovable Africanus. He's around five years old and needs someone to love and to love him.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
